text.message: what makes you think I have ore?
are u going for the tree port?
im just pushing pass until next game
u can be brutally honest w me i wont get upset
i just dont want to waste resources
I am not fighting for anything
cool you can have. I cant come close to winning this
i haven't gotten one resource yet lol
you got 3 cards out of it though
yea rlly i cant get the brick back?
are u really denying that youre ahead
yea i am but im not on 7 with 3 other devs
no. dont say something is not nice when you are at 7
you are very obviously in the lead here mate
its not nice that I blocked the person in 2nd?
im fine w u blocking me we are all trying ot win here
just think its a lil absurd youre acting like you are not clearly destroying us
you didnt know before hey thats not nice you aare at 7
i was talking to green mate
